name: Direction Check
description: This one watches whether you tend to sing flat or sharp, then gives you a quick trick to correct it.

feedback.intro: Sing each note naturally. After a few, I'll tell you if you tend flat or sharp and give you a correction trick.
feedback.tooFlat: You're trending flat — try singing 'Gee' to brighten the placement.
feedback.tooSharp: You're trending sharp — try 'Guh' to relax into the note.
feedback.tip: Everyone has a natural drift direction. Knowing yours is the first step to correcting it.
